name: Mirage
archetype: Trickster Duelist, level 8, master of misdirection
speech_patterns: Often speaks in riddles or misleading half-truths
quirks: Collects strange trinkets to use as props
Never gives a straight answer when a cryptic one will do
example_phrases: Now you see me, now you... well, you never really saw me at all.
The trick isn't being invisible, it's making them look the wrong way.
I could tell you how I did it, but where's the fun in that?
Reality is just another stage, friend. Let me show you the curtain.
Three truths and a lie? How about three lies and a half-truth?
